description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in a fitted, ornate outfit with metallic embellishments on the shoulders and chest, giving a formal and somewhat ceremonial appearance. He wears a striking, large, gold triangular headpiece with a circular, gear-like halo, which is highly distinctive and likely symbolic. The figure's clothing is detailed with structured lines and appears to be made of a glossy, leather-like material, with metallic accents at the cuffs, belt, and shoulders. His posture suggests he is in mid-stride, with one leg forward and arms slightly bent, as if walking. The footwear is robust and matches the formal style of the outfit. The headpiece is the most visually dominant accessory, adding a unique and dramatic element to his overall look.
description: A formally dressed adult male pedestrian with ornate metallic accents and a large, gold triangular headpiece with a circular halo, depicted in a walking pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed chest embellishments, facial features, and the full frontal display of the gold triangular headpiece and halo.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the headpiece, the fitted nature of the outfit, and the forward stride of the left leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the ornate outfit, the back of the headpiece and halo, and the overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the headpiece, the right arm's position, and the stride of the right leg.
attribute_clothing_type: ornate formal suit with metallic embellishments and a large ceremonial headpiece
